senses.definition_en: physical or mental energy used to do something; an attempt to do something

examples.en: She put a lot of effort into preparing for the exam.
examples.fa: او تلاش زیادی برای آماده‌شدن برای امتحان کرد.

idioms.example_en: Please make an effort to arrive on time.
idioms.example_fa: لطفاً تلاش کنید سر وقت برسید.

notes: Usually uncountable when talking about effort in general ("a lot of effort"), but countable when referring to specific attempts ("several efforts to fix the problem").
